# Steam Clean

> Premium mobile car wash and detailing in Auckland, Wellington & Christchurch. Eco-friendly steam wash, ceramic coating, interior & exterior detailing at your home or office — book in 60 seconds.

## Services
- Mobile car wash at home or office
- Interior deep cleaning & shampoo
- Exterior polish & paint correction
- 9H ceramic coating (2-year warranty)
- Steam wash — under 2 litres of water per car

## Areas served
Auckland, Wellington, Christchurch (New Zealand)

## Pages
- [Home](/): Services, packages, booking, gallery and FAQ.
- [Pricing Guide](/pricing-guide): What car detailing costs in NZ and what's included in each package.
